texto: When launching a product called an Energy Drink and named Red Bull, a product that stimulates body and mind, it is a short step to the roots where Red Bull came from. We have been doing this for 20 years - now it's called adventure sports, extreme sports, and outdoor sports.
explicacao: Citação de Dietrich Mateschitz sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When launching a product called an Energy Drink and named Red Bull, a product that stimulates bod…” articula reflexao, adventure, short em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como short e red.

frase_original: When launching a product called an Energy Drink and named Red Bull, a product that stimulates body and mind, it is a short step to the roots where Red Bull came from. We have been doing this for 20 years - now it's called adventure sports, extreme sports, and outdoor sports.
